entries.name: Apple Crumble Cookie

entries.name: Sandwich Section
entries.comment: The team is putting all the breads together which might cause a confusion and lead to a customer complaints
entries.correctiveAction: we instructed the team to separate the  sandwiches and to put the bread each type in a container to avoid mixing

entries.comment: The cucumber cubes contains small PCs  and liquid which can lead to a spoilage

entries.name: Beetroot Seasoned
entries.comment: The team is not adding a strainer to the  component which caused a presentation issue
entries.correctiveAction: We informed the team to add a strainer to avoid the issue in the future and informed Chef Mukesh to check with the team to maintain adding a strainer

entries.name: Minin Burger Bun
entries.comment: The team is putting the bread in big batches congested in GN container which caused more damage to the breads
entries.correctiveAction: Informed the section head to avoid putting the breads in big batches, instead he should be using smaller containers

entries.name: Sliced Tomato
entries.comment: The tomato size is not accurate as per the recipe
entries.correctiveAction: we informed the section head to retrain the team on how to cut the sliced tomato and to follow the  recipe

entries.name: Comissary Section
entries.comment: The comissary section is not cleaned all  the shift and its repeated daily
entries.correctiveAction: we informed chef Mukesh and the steward supervisor to maintain the section cleanliness and informed the section head to focus more on it

entries.name: Garlic Parmesan Chicken Strips
entries.comment: The cut size of the chicken is not accurate
entries.correctiveAction: "We trained the team on how to maintain the cut size and informed chef Mukesh to follow up with them"

entries.name: Low Fat Roatsed Potato
entries.comment: "The potato was not roasted properly and it looked boiled"
entries.correctiveAction: "We informed section head to follow with  the team to focus more and to inform us with any challenges they have

entries.name: Meatball and Patties Machine
entries.comment: The machine pot has extra beef mince coming out of it and the shape of the patties is not accurate also the texture changed
entries.correctiveAction: We have instructed the team to use a plastic dcraper to clean the convier and to use a brush and oil to prush it slightly so the patties will not stick to it, we talked to Sagar to check why the mince is coming  out of the pot and to check if we can reduce the blades to avoid over mincing, we will also check with WP MP about how they are doing it

entries.name: Sliced Tomato
entries.comment: The team is adding only one PC of tomato slice  despit the guideline is indicating 18 grams and 13 grams
entries.correctiveAction: We have instructed the team to stick to the grams and  we raised to the NPD team to change the sliced tomato  to Tomato rounds

entries.name: Portioning
entries.comment: "The team is using hands in portioning which causing a presentation issue"
entries.correctiveAction: We have instrucetd the team to use spoons or tongs for for the components and informed the Aditya to buy the requiered utinsils

entries.name: Feta Cheese
entries.comment: The team is portioning the cheese with hand which causing presentation issue
entries.correctiveAction: We have raised it to the NPD team to change the feta cheese to mini feta cubes

entries.name: Mango
entries.comment: The team is serving sour and white mango
entries.correctiveAction: We have instructed the team to choose the good ones

entries.name: Egg Molds
entries.comment: The omelet mold are dirty and the team is not  cleaning it while working which may lead to  foreign object complaints
entries.correctiveAction: We have instructed the team to make dry cleaning after  each batch

entries.name: Sandwich Section
entries.comment: The team is two big components at the same  time and there is no enough staff to finish it as it  may cause dryness
entries.correctiveAction: We have instructed the section leader not to make two lines if there is no enough staff

entries.name: Frozen Egg white
entries.comment: The egg white frozen tasted very bitter which affected the final product
entries.correctiveAction: We have made the current batch with fresh egg white and raised the issue to the team SC to fix

entries.name: Commissary
entries.comment: The commissary section accumulating dirty  containers in the section and the section floor  was dirty
entries.correctiveAction: "We instructed the team to remove the containers  and called the steward to clean, we will inform the  steward supervisor to maintain the schedule"

entries.name: Poached Pulled Chicken
entries.comment: Poached pulled chicken was watery
entries.correctiveAction: We instructed the team to add a strainer to remove  the extra liquid, we also informed chef mukesh to inform the hot section team to add the strainer every time

entries.name: Hot Honey Halloumi
entries.comment: The hot honey halloumi was overcooked
entries.correctiveAction: we instructed the team to make another one

entries.name: Roasted Potato
entries.comment: The team was overloading the tray
entries.correctiveAction: We informed the team to reduce the quantity to 3 kg per tray

entries.name: Mini burger bun
entries.comment: "The team is putting the bread in big batches congested in GN container which caused more damage to the breads"
entries.correctiveAction: "Informed the section head to avoid putting the breads in big batches, instead he should be using smaller containers"

entries.name: Mandi chicken
entries.comment: Some of The mandi chicken is shreded
entries.correctiveAction: We will inform the section head to avoid cutting the chicken while its too hot

entries.name: Fried Egg white
entries.comment: Fried egg white name was wrong, it was egg  white patty
entries.correctiveAction: We informed the team to change the name and to take care and focus on labeling

entries.name: Parmesan cheese
entries.comment: The parmesan cheese had a purple color
entries.correctiveAction: We informed the portioning team to change the cheese and use new one and we informed Chef Mukesh to check with the team

entries.name: Mandarine
entries.comment: The mandarine had some PCs with black color
entries.correctiveAction: We segregated it and informed Chef Mukesh to check  with the team

entries.name: Lime wedges
entries.comment: "The team is not segregating the lime wedges  properly"
entries.correctiveAction: "we have informed the section leader to put more focus  on the segregation"

entries.name: Lemon wedges
entries.comment: The team is not segregating the lemon wedges  properly
entries.correctiveAction: we have informed the section leader to put more focus  on the segregation

entries.name: Potato

entries.name: Coriander pepper Tikka
entries.comment: The tikka color is not accurate

entries.name: Gesame meatball machine
entries.comment: The machine is leaking and the patties is  sticking to the convyer
entries.correctiveAction: We have raised it to the maintenance team to check with  the supplier to fix the machine

entries.name: Beef Patty
entries.comment: The color and texture of the patties is not  accurate
entries.correctiveAction: we will be checking the whole process and fix the gaps

entries.name: Butterscotch cheesecake
entries.comment: The photo on the dashboard is different from  the actual
entries.correctiveAction: We have raised it to the NPD team to fix

entries.name: Portioning
entries.comment: "The team is portioning the cheese with hand which causing presentation issue"
entries.correctiveAction: We are making SOP for portioning utensils and Aflah will be conducting the trianing, currently we instructed the  team to use spoons and cups

entries.name: Chicken Enchilada
entries.comment: The team is not baking the enchiladas properly as it suppose to be slighty browned
entries.correctiveAction: We informed Chef Mukesh and Chef Lokesh to check with  the team to ensure proper baking

entries.name: Pink Chia Pudding
entries.comment: The portioning team found plastic inside the chia pudding which is from the milk plastic covers
entries.correctiveAction: We replaced the batch with new one and informd chef  Mukesh to brief the team

entries.name: Pulled Beef
entries.comment: The pulled beef had some chunks and not pulled properly
entries.correctiveAction: we informed Chef Lokesh to check with the team

entries.name: Sun dried tomato
entries.comment: The team is not roasting the tomatoes properly
entries.correctiveAction: we informed Chef Lokesh to check with the team

entries.name: strawberry Chia Jam
entries.comment: The component was not cooked, it seemed that its made cold
entries.correctiveAction: We replaced the batch with new one and informed the team to follow the recipe properly and informed chef Mukesh to follow with them

entries.name: Othamni Spice Mix
entries.comment: The quantity of the spice was too much per meal
entries.correctiveAction: we raised a workflow to reduce the amount to 5 grams

entries.name: Avocado Mash
entries.comment: The avocado quality was not good
entries.correctiveAction: We informed the section head to replace it with new one

entries.name: Enchiladas filling
entries.comment: the filling was liquid
entries.correctiveAction: We informed the team to reduce the amount of salsa roja and we will raise a workflow to reduce it on the recipe

entries.name: Mini burger bun
entries.comment: the team is stocking the buns in big qontainers with big quantities which is causing damage to the buns
entries.correctiveAction: We informed the team to reduce the amount they are stocking in the containers to half to avoid damaging the  buns

entries.name: Portioning
entries.comment: The team was portioning the cheese manually which caused presentation issue
entries.correctiveAction: We raised it to the NPD to change the cheese to mini feta cubes

entries.name: Sauteed Mushroom
entries.comment: The mushroom color was dark due to mushroom  quality issue
entries.correctiveAction: We raised it to the SC to check with the supplier

entries.name: Roamine Lettuce
entries.comment: The romaine lettuce was dark in color
entries.correctiveAction: we returned it to the team to check and informed the KM to raise it to the SC

entries.name: Ingredients
entries.comment: The team is leaving the components outside  the chiller for a long time which may cause spoliage
entries.correctiveAction: We requested the KM to check for another chiller in the section to avoid such issue

entries.name: Browne Blisscake
entries.comment: The bliss cake was not fully cut
entries.correctiveAction: We informed Chef Mukesh to check with the team and advised the protioning team to check the grams before serving

entries.name: Mini Burger Bun
entries.comment: The team is taking out all the quantity required one time
entries.correctiveAction: We informed the team not to take all the quantity one time and informed Chef Mukesh and Chef Lokesh to try to reduce the amount taking for cutting so it will not be  tottaly defrosted to avoid crumbling and breaking

entries.name: Stewarding
entries.comment: "The team is loading too much containers on  plastic trolley which may cause accident"
entries.correctiveAction: We informed the steward supervisor to instruct the team not to laod that much of containers to avoid any accident may happen

entries.name: Chicken Biryani Stew
entries.comment: The chicken biryani was shredded and its not  as per the recipe
entries.correctiveAction: We returned it to the kitchen for the team to correct it and informed Chef Mukesh to check with the team as there was training done before on thesame component

entries.name: basmati Rice
entries.comment: The rice is over blast chilled and almost frozen
entries.correctiveAction: We informed Chef Lokesh and informed the team to follow the blast chilling time properly and to nix it properly before removing

entries.name: Lebanese Chicken Kofta
entries.comment: The kofta is frozen and has a freeze burn and  some are fresh which is affecting the quality
entries.correctiveAction: We informed Chef SomDutt to chekc with the butchery team

entries.name: Hot Section
entries.comment: There is no other chillier in hot section to store  the daily used components and its left ourside  which can cause spoliage
entries.correctiveAction: We informed Chef Mukesh to check for another chiller

entries.name: Fried Egg Settings
entries.comment: Multiple seetings for egg fried setting which is confusing
entries.correctiveAction: We will raise it to the NPD team for fixing

entries.name: Chicken sausage patty
entries.comment: The patties in a bad shape and texture due to recipe issue and long time freezing
entries.correctiveAction: We are making a trial on the recipe to fix it and informed the team not to freeze a big quantitiy

entries.name: Mushroom
entries.comment: The mushroom quality is very bad and dark in color
entries.correctiveAction: We have done a trial with chef mukesh and chef lokesh and it was acceptable due to the situation and we are using currently canned mushroom

entries.name: Zereshk
entries.comment: The zereshk have too much dry stems
entries.correctiveAction: We returned it to the kitchen for segregation

entries.name: Cafe Sandwiches
entries.comment: Cafe wraps are not available in the facility
entries.correctiveAction: We have tried different packaging and sent it temporary until we get the proper wraps

entries.name: Comissary
entries.comment: The team is putting the ingredients on the dwon shelf of the table and uncovered
entries.correctiveAction: We instructed the team to remove the ingredients and cover  it

entries.name: Brwone blisscake
entries.comment: The current trays is not suitable for the blisscake
entries.correctiveAction: We checked with chef Mukesh about the tays but needs to  make an order for purchasing

entries.name: Lemon grass cheesecake
entries.comment: The topping is not accurate and the shape is not proper
entries.correctiveAction: We informed the team to give a heads up when the meal  comes to the menu agaisnso we can train them on how to use the piping bag proeprly

entries.name: Tahini chocolate chip cookies
entries.comment: The cookies were dry and not as per the recipe
entries.correctiveAction: We informed the team to make another one and to add more almond milk and we fixed it on the recipe

entries.name: Emawash Shrimp
entries.comment: The recipe indicates to cook the shrimp with the marination which is releasing too much liquid
entries.correctiveAction: We are fixing the recipe currently and we will raise it to the  NPD team
entries.notes: The current recipe is better in taste and texture than the one we tried

entries.name: Portioning
entries.comment: The Meals Containers are dirty
entries.correctiveAction: We informed the team to change it and informed the  supervisor

entries.name: Poatato Cubes
entries.comment: The blade is dull which is affecting the quality of the potatoes
entries.correctiveAction: We raised it to the maintance manager to check if we can change it

entries.name: Halloumi Sticks
entries.comment: The halloumi cheese is high in salt
entries.correctiveAction: We raised it to the NPD team to add a soaking step in the  recipe and we informed the team to follow the same process

entries.name: Eggs Awarma
entries.comment: The scrambled egg is not mixed properly as the  team is cooking it in the oven
entries.correctiveAction: We raised to the NPD team to add the oven cooking in the in the recipe and we informed the team to mix it in the middle of cooking

entries.name: Peanut Cluster
entries.comment: The peanut cluster color is not proper as the  team used the chocolate while its hot
entries.correctiveAction: We informed the team to change the damaged PCs and  we instructed them to use the chocolate when it becomes 30 to 32 dgree to avoid color changing

entries.name: Egyptian Bread
entries.comment: The bread PCs are variant, some are very small
entries.correctiveAction: We instructed the team to segregate it and informed the  section head to check with the team while cutting

entries.name: Comissary
entries.comment: The section was dirty and the team is not  cleanning
entries.correctiveAction: We instructed the team to stop work and clean the section and we informed the section head to follow up with the team

entries.name: Grilled Chicken
entries.comment: The chicken cooking is variant as the perforated  trays drains the liquids to each others and the  texture of the chicken is different which may cause a customer complaints
entries.correctiveAction: We informed Chef Lokesh and we suggested to add a tray  under each perforated tray to prevent the dripping

entries.name: Beef Patty
entries.comment: The beef patty shape still same
entries.correctiveAction: We will follow up with the maintenance supervisor to check the ETA

entries.name: Chicken Biryani Stew
entries.comment: The chicken is overcooked and the  garvy is very thin
entries.correctiveAction: We have raised it to the NPD team to fix it

entries.name: Lemongrass Cheesecake
entries.comment: The cheese cake is delicate and its poor in presentation
entries.correctiveAction: We have raised to the NPD team to change the shape into muffin mold shape
